feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: (My Prison Was) Just An Open Cage
entry.summary:
Author: nerdwegian

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 141,570Chapters: 14/16Kudos: 168

Summary: Eddie is working hard on figuring himself out, getting a life, and also reestablishing contact with Buck after worrying about them drifting apart and their friendship changing. Realizing that sometimes people misunderstand his relationship with Buck should not be the shock it is. Also, if Chris could stop launching verbal sneak attacks on him, he'd appreciate it. Meanwhile, Buck's learning to parent a toddler while not at all being insecure about something said by one Margaret Buckley. He's just studiously avoiding the word 'Parent' like the plague, and otherwise doing his damn best. or If Buck had a nickel for every time someone left him their kid in their will without his knowledge–well, he’d have two nickels. Which isn’t a lot, but it’s weird that it’s happened twice now.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Issue with Amortentia
entry.summary:
Author: Unhingedoveractivemuse

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,573Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: His sister hums. “It doesn’t change the fact that you smelled a lot of scents associated with Eddie.” He does not like where her logic is going. At all. He’s here for validation, not clarification. “I spend a lot of time with him. He’s my best friend.” ”Who you might or might not be in love with according to the Amortentia.”

entry.title: when the monitors go silent
entry.summary:
Author: IckyTulip

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,459Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 17

Summary: The pain from New Mexico never really went away, so Buck started taking more pills than he should. When he collapses during a call, the team fights to save him. But no one knows why it happened. And no one knows about the letters he left behind. Does he wake up?

entry.title: Three Of A Kind
entry.summary:
Author: Warlock_Nerd

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,248Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 21

Summary: What’s more pathetic than being in love with your best friend and co-parenting his kid with him then co-parenting your own kid with him in return?And what’s more pathetic than that then moving in together platonically so that the kids can have a better routine?And more pathetic than that is sharing a bed so that the two kids can have a room each?!And more more more more pathetic… how about adding a third child into the mix?***AKA - Buck and Eddie are still hopelessly in love with each other but too scared to make a move even after moving in and raising two kids together. So Destiny herself has had enough and made a plan to get these idiots together by magicking them a baby girl in the Safe Haven Baby Box.Enjoy :3

entry.summary:
Author: gika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 181,081Chapters: 17/24Kudos: 117

Summary: When Eddie suddenly finds himself in debt and is desperate to prove his worth as a father, he decides to take on secret jobs as a male escort, all while hiding his new life from Christopher, his friends, and especially from Buck, the man who may always have been his true home.

entry.title: first comes love, then comes marriage
entry.summary:
Author: deadwriter16

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,716Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 248

Summary: “I think I know a secret,” Theo says, voice now softened to a whisper.“Oh, you do?” Theo beckons him forward, so Chris makes a big show of leaning towards him.“Buck and Eddie make each other happy,” Theo whispers. “They’re married.”-----Buck and Eddie are not married. They really should be, though. Chris and Theo help with that.

entry.title: Make it till midnight
entry.summary:
Author: Asp3n_bvddiel0ver

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,533Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Following the lawsuit, Buck is ostracized by the fire fam, except for Hen and Athena. He is subjected to taunts and emotional abuse, leading him to feel isolated and depressed.Buck goes to a bar where he meets Elliot and Colby. After becoming intoxicated, he is assaulted by them, sustaining injuries. When buck wakes up the next morning he has no memory of what happened, he begins a relationship with Elliot, who manipulates him into believing the injuries were from a fall. Buck experiences further abuse from Elliot, including physical violence and emotional manipulation. Eddie notices Buck's injuries and changes in behavior, becoming increasingly concerned about his well-being. He suspects Elliot is harming Buck.Buck, realizing the danger he is in, attempts to escape Elliot and Colby. Eddie, alerted by a coded message from Buck. Eddie, along with Hen, Chimney, and Bobby, tracks them down. The 118 intervenes, and Athena arrests Elliot and Colby.Buck is severely injured during the confrontation,He is rushed to the hospital, and Eddie stays by his side, expressing regret for his past actions, but will that be enough?

entry.title: There's No You Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,450Chapters: 13/30Kudos: 36

Summary: “Where are you driving from?” Eddie asked, his mouth moving before he could stop it, his brain deciding that awkward small talk was infinitely safer than just standing there vibrating with nervous energy. “East,” the guy replied with a casual, fluid roll of his broad shoulders. “Farther than I wanted to be, honestly. And definitely longer than I originally planned.” Before the army, before Los Angeles, and long before the 118, there was a dusty gas station on the edge of El Paso, a broken-down Jeep with Pennsylvania plates, and a stranger named Evan. For years, they were each other's entire world, surviving basic training, AIT, and a grueling deployment side-by-side. But a devastating wave of silence and a massive misunderstanding tore them apart, leaving behind a deep, soul-cutting ache and a history neither of them ever truly moved on from. Now, the past has finally caught up to the present. Standing under the harsh fluorescent lights of Station 118, Eddie and Evan are forced to navigate the wreckage of the life they left behind—and the terrifying truth of everything they never stopped running from.

entry.title: Escaping Into The Future
entry.summary:
Author: buckdiazzzley

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 911Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 1

Summary: In a universe full of many worlds, two particular worlds, Buck and Eddie's, collide. Their very first interaction starts off messy. And that is exactly what Eddie wants, Eddie wants something to distract him. Something to let him escape his past and distract him while he's still figuring out his new life along with his new job being a paramedic- except for Buck, it's the opposite. Buck wants something to commit to. A relationship. Ever since his ex, Tommy Kinard, broke things off for no reason- Buck wanted to show his ex that he could fully commit to a relationship. To do all the hopes and desires his ex dreamed of with someone new. And that someone new is Eddie Diaz.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Bullet For You
entry.summary:
Author: Need_lifeline

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,161Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 89

Summary: “Buckley! What the hell?” Eddie hisses, appearing out of thin air.“Hey…Eds.” Buck nervously smiles, trying for casual.“Why the hell are you here?”“Uh…” the adrenaline has finally worn off Buck’s system, even though he feels like he should still have some due to a very angry Eddie in front of him, but he feels his energy leave him slowly“No, I don’t want to hear it. You’re always putting yourself in danger, but now you put my son in danger, Evan.”Buck physically feels all his energy drain out, not that he had much left, but the little he had just crumples under him at that moment.Buck sees him as he picks up Chris and takes him outside to get checked. He tries to call out to him, to explain himself, but he can’t.“I- I didn’t mean to.” Buck mutters under his breath but it doesn’t even sound convincing to his own ears. His ears that were currently ringing louder and louder confusing his brain.Pain. Why is he in pain? He can feel it now, all over him.“I- I think-” he hears someone say, it might’ve been him, right as everything turns pitch black.OR: Buck gets shot, Eddie gets mad at Buck and doesn't realize he got shot until it's too late.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: muscle to muscle
entry.summary:

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 237,853Chapters: 58/?Kudos: 152

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Far too little too late
entry.summary:
Author: Reese667

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,917Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 1,572

Summary: Evan “Buck” Buckley fought for his family. He fought to get back to them and now that he’s back his family won’t even look at him without disdain anymore. Buck had dropped the lawsuit and his family won’t forgive him for suing them. Originally Buck thought it’d blow over but after 2 months he’s lost hope for things going back to normal. Then his call back to action from the Navy comes and he doesn’t fight it.Aka: Buck is tired of fighting for the family that no longer wants him. Its set during the post Lawsuit era and its a story about of Buck was a Naval aviator and he gets called back for the suicide mission from Top Gun: Maverick.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 310,873Chapters: 64/?Kudos: 126

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.
